rules.rule: package_id MUST resolve and MUST be in 'export-ready' lifecycle state
stabilization_id MUST resolve to an existing Phase 55 export stabilization
from_state and to_state MUST be in the activation states enum
(from_state -> to_state) MUST be in the explicit allowed transitions table
transition to 'production-approved' requires a passing readiness-audit reference (Phase 56)
transition to 'production-active' requires a passing deployment-verification reference (Phase 57)
transition to 'rollback-candidate' requires a recovery_playbook_id reference
activation is APPEND-ONLY: each transition is a new lifecycle record; prior state never mutated; no overwrite semantics
